scripts.start: nohup bun run server.ts > /dev/null 2>&1 & echo $! > .server.pid && echo 'Server started'
scripts.stop: test -f .server.pid && kill $(cat .server.pid) 2>/dev/null && rm .server.pid && echo 'Server stopped' || echo 'Server not running'
scripts.restart: bun stop; bun build && bun start
scripts.db:clear: rm -f chat.db chat.db-shm chat.db-wal && echo 'DB cleared'
